subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — it's great to hear from you after the conference. I'd be glad to set up a meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Let me know which one works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information. That said, I'm happy to coordinate internally and make sure the right people from our team are included in our discussions once we've had our initial meeting.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
